current_suggestion.pitch: I need to flag uncertainty here: I cannot confidently verify a 24-character channel ID for a philosophy channel that precisely matches your interests without risking fabrication. Rather than invent an ID, I'm flagging this honestly — please search YouTube for 'Einzelganger' (@Einzelganger), a solo philosophy channel producing essay-style videos on Stoicism, Taoism, and the examined life with genuine depth and no culture-war noise. It directly complements your Aurelius/Seneca/Epictetus interests with a perspective your current channels (mostly health/poker/finance) don't provide, and the format — calm, well-researched solo essays under 20 minutes — fills the 'thoughtful long-form ideas worth sitting with' slot without redundancy.
